justification: All pass criteria met: (1) Manual restart requirement identified as 'broken' interaction and hard production-readiness blocker in escalations, (2) Dynamic primary resolution recommended via DNS/RDS endpoint/PgBouncer/Consul, (3) No retry on connection error identified as reliability gap with specific fix (1-2 retries with backoff for idempotent reads), (4) Read replica routing identified and correctly tiered as 'NICE-TO-HAVE for launch, SHOULD-HAVE post-launch' — an optimization not a blocker, (5) Verdict is NOT READY, (6) Multiple specific recommendations provided across failure modes. No failure modes triggered.

observations.text: Correctly identified manual restart as a hard blocker with clear explanation of why failover is not an edge case
Properly tiered read replica routing as optimization rather than reliability blocker, avoiding the failure mode of treating it as must-have
Connection retry gap clearly identified with safe, specific remediation (1-2 retries for idempotent reads)
Went beyond rubric requirements with useful additional findings: connection pool exhaustion risk, missing statement_timeout, observability gaps, and on-call runbook recommendation
Escalations are well-structured with clear reasoning and appropriate routing
Confidence areas and assumptions are transparent and reasonable
